title: pennilabium longicaule
intro: Pennilabium longicaule, also known as the Long-Leaf Pennilabium, is a plant species that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, Pennilabium longicaule has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Pennilabium longicaule are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are consumed orally or applied topically for various health benefits.
